name: Steel Enhancer
desc_clean: Awoken 0 I've used Wildwood sap as a mild steel polish as well, providing combat benefits to the Awoken that receive my treatment.

Sap.definition_short: Debuff redukujący atak po każdym ataku.

mechanic_summary: Steel Enhancer to Spell klanu Awoken. Awoken 0 I've used Wildwood sap as a mild steel polish as well, providing combat benefits to the Awoken that receive my treatment. Keywords: Sap.
